n: In Search of the Lost Lord

steps.t: Faltharan can be found just inside the western entrance to Glaniath in Upper Lebennin. Arvellon has heard of Faltharan's arrival in Glaniath. You shou…
Sirthanc can be found to the north-west of Glaniath in Upper Lebennin. Faltharan has asked you to accompany him to the beacon Sirthanc where he believ…
A watch-horn can be found somewhere near the beacon Sirthanc. You have defeated many of the Haradrim and should now confront their leader.
Sirthanc can be found in north-western Upper Lebennin. You have defeated the leader of the Haradrim and should now search the beacon for Lord Sirgon.
The binding pole can be found on Sirthanc in north-western Upper Lebennin. You have discovered Lord Sirgon bound to a pole on Sirthanc, and should now…
Lord Sirgon can be found at Sirthanc in north-western Upper Lebennin. Faltharan has asked you to speak to his father while he examines the Lord's inju…
Faltharan can be found at Sirthanc in north-western Upper Lebennin. You have spoken to Lord Sirgon and should now speak to Faltharan.
